---
title: "A little bit about me"
---

- I am a Bay Area native!

Hobbies include:
    - exploring restaurants and cafes
    - baking
    - tidepooling
    - watching anime
    - playing gacha games

One of my favorite quotes is:

> "Do or do not. There is no try".
>
> Jedi Grand Master Yoda


My favorite boba drinks are the mango coconut drink and the grapefruit tea from Heytea!


My favorite colors are `#afeeee` #afeeee and `#2fcccc` #2fcccc.
